mnemonics: JEDI Fights for Requirements: JAD, Ethnography, Document Analysis, Interviews, Focus Groups
keyPoints: Interviews (one-on-one sessions with stakeholders to gather in-depth insights)
Focus Groups (group discussions to build consensus and identify conflicting views)
Document Analysis (reviewing existing reports, forms, and systems to understand current data needs)
commonMistakes: Asking leading questions that bias stakeholder responses instead of gathering objective needs
Focusing only on current requirements without planning for future scalability and changes
Failing to include representatives from all key stakeholder groups, leading to incomplete requirements
